The cards, they been very, very good to: Hey, he's not one of us!  Take care of him!

「這些牌待我很、很好呢。」: 聞起來像巨魔汗水。嚐起來像巨魔汗水。天哪，它真的就是巨魔汗水…

The cards, they been very, very good to: You seem to have gone a little overboard on the ale (or at least falling off the seat).

The cards, they been very, very good to: You inform the bartender that you seem to be temporarily strapped for funds.
「這些牌待我很、很好呢。」: 你告訴酒保你現在好像臨時沒錢。

The cards, they been very, very good to: Hey Crusher!  Get this deadbeat bum outta here!
「這些牌待我很、很好呢。」: 「嘿粉碎者！把這個賴皮鬼趕出去！」

The cards, they been very, very good to: The bartender glares at you as you enter, and so does the ugly goon on the left.  You get the impression that you are not welcome.
「這些牌待我很、很好呢。」: 你進去時酒保瞪了你，左邊那個醜陋的打手也是。你有種不受歡迎的感覺。

The cards, they been very, very good to: The grimy window lets little light into this tavern.  It smells like stale ale and other more unpleasant things.  The floor is covered with dirt, and the bar with sticky beer.
「這些牌待我很、很好呢。」: 髒污的窗戶讓很少的光進入這間酒館。聞起來像陳舊的麥酒和其他更難聞的東西。地板覆著污垢，吧台黏著啤酒。

The cards, they been very, very good to: Smoke appears to be rising from the center cask behind the bar.  To your right, two gamblers are playing cards.
「這些牌待我很、很好呢。」: 煙霧似乎從吧台後面的中央酒桶升起。你右邊，兩個賭徒在玩牌。

The cards, they been very, very good to: Not a pleasant sight!  There seems to be something slimy spilled the stool, and it is eating into the wood.  You think perhaps you should sit on the next stool over.
「這些牌待我很、很好呢。」: 不是個愉快的景象！凳子上好像灑了什麼黏稠的東西，正在侵蝕木頭。你想也許應該坐下一個凳子。

The cards, they been very, very good to: Looks like some kind of card game.
「這些牌待我很、很好呢。」: 看起來像某種牌戲。

The cards, they been very, very good to: That's a mighty unusual keg, there.
「這些牌待我很、很好呢。」: 那是個非常不尋常的酒桶呢。

The cards, they been very, very good to: There appears to be a trapdoor beneath the goon, but he's blocking it very effectively.
「這些牌待我很、很好呢。」: 打手下面好像有個活板門，但他擋得很有效。

The cards, they been very, very good to: The window is open, but not much light seems to make it in here.
「這些牌待我很、很好呢。」: 窗戶是開的，但似乎進不來多少光。

The cards, they been very, very good to: Affects where knife goes.
「這些牌待我很、很好呢。」: 影響刀子的著彈位置。

The cards, they been very, very good to: Place hand on red dot.
「這些牌待我很、很好呢。」: 把手放在紅點上。

The cards, they been very, very good to: The barrels are large enough to hide several unlucky adventurers.  Let's hope you're not that unlucky.
「這些牌待我很、很好呢。」: 這些桶子大到足以藏下好幾個倒楣的冒險者。希望你沒那麼倒楣。

The cards, they been very, very good to: It looks a bit like a dart board, only bigger.
「這些牌待我很、很好呢。」: 看起來有點像飛鏢靶，不過大一點。

The cards, they been very, very good to: There sure are a lot of daggers in the board.  You wonder where the Chief Thief keeps them all.
「這些牌待我很、很好呢。」: 板上真的有很多匕首。你納悶盜賊首領把它們全放在哪兒。

The cards, they been very, very good to: The game is called Dag-Nab-It.  You take turns with the Chief Thief throwing daggers at the board.  Each player gets three turns, and throws three daggers in each turn.
「這些牌待我很、很好呢。」: 這遊戲叫「飛刀擊中」。你跟盜賊首領輪流向靶子擲匕首。每個玩家三輪機會，每輪擲三支匕首。

The cards, they been very, very good to: More points are scored the closer each dagger hits to the center of the board.  Highest score wins the bet.
「這些牌待我很、很好呢。」: 匕首越靠近靶心就得越多分。最高分贏賭注。

The cards, they been very, very good to: Adjust force and angle of throw with the arrow keys or mouse, according to your hand position.  Press Enter or click on the small dag-nab-it board to throw.
「這些牌待我很、很好呢。」: 根據手位置用方向鍵或滑鼠調整投擲力度和角度。按 Enter 或點擊小飛刀擊中靶盤來擲出。

The cards, they been very, very good to: You can call me 'Boris'.  I'm the Chief Financial Officer for the Guild.
「這些牌待我很、很好呢。」: 「你可以叫我『鮑里斯』。我是公會的財務主管。」

The cards, they been very, very good to: We sell lockpicks and thief toolkits here.
「這些牌待我很、很好呢。」: 「我們這裡賣開鎖工具和盜賊工具組。」

The cards, they been very, very good to: Our very special items are reserved for our guild members.  No scabs allowed.
「這些牌待我很、很好呢。」: 「我們最特殊的物品只保留給公會成員。不收臨時工。」

The cards, they been very, very good to: Fencing
「這些牌待我很、很好呢。」: 銷贓

The cards, they been very, very good to: License
「這些牌待我很、很好呢。」: 執照

The cards, they been very, very good to: Lock Pick
「這些牌待我很、很好呢。」: 開鎖工具

The cards, they been very, very good to: Services
「這些牌待我很、很好呢。」: 服務

The cards, they been very, very good to: Tool Kit
「這些牌待我很、很好呢。」: 工具組

The cards, they been very, very good to: Tools
「這些牌待我很、很好呢。」: 工具

The cards, they been very, very good to: A Thief's license will cost you 25 silvers.  You will need a license to use any of our services.
「這些牌待我很、很好呢。」: 「盜賊執照要 25 銀幣。使用我們的任何服務都需要執照。」

The cards, they been very, very good to: You can't fence something you don't have.
「這些牌待我很、很好呢。」: 「沒有的東西沒法銷贓。」

The cards, they been very, very good to: We buy only from our members.
「這些牌待我很、很好呢。」: 「我們只跟成員收購。」

The cards, they been very, very good to: That doesn't look like something we can resell.
「這些牌待我很、很好呢。」: 「那看起來不像我們能轉賣的東西。」

The cards, they been very, very good to: We are happy to give recompense for any items you may have borrowed from others.
「這些牌待我很、很好呢。」: 「我們很樂意為你向別人『借來』的任何物品給予賠償。」

The cards, they been very, very good to: A Thief's License will cost you 25 silvers.  You will need a license to use any of our services.
「這些牌待我很、很好呢。」: 「盜賊執照要 25 銀幣。使用我們的任何服務都需要執照。」

The cards, they been very, very good to: How else can you borrow things effectively?  The investment of your lifetime for fifteen silvers.
「這些牌待我很、很好呢。」: 「不然你要怎麼有效地『借』東西？終身投資只要 15 銀幣。」

The cards, they been very, very good to: The license allows you to steal in town without us tipping the Sheriff, allows you to purchase professional quality tools, provides fencing services at no extra charge, and pays for the flowers on your grave in the event of an untimely accident.
「這些牌待我很、很好呢。」: 「執照讓你在城裡偷東西而我們不會通風報信治安官，讓你購買專業級工具，提供免費銷贓服務，還有如果你不幸身亡會幫你墓上買花。」

The cards, they been very, very good to: It's a steal for only one hundred silvers.  (heh, heh)
「這些牌待我很、很好呢。」: 「只要 100 銀幣真是划算。(嘿嘿)」

The cards, they been very, very good to: Perhaps I could sell you a good lockpick for fifteen silvers, or a wonderful Acme Thief Tool Kit for one hundred silvers.
「這些牌待我很、很好呢。」: 「也許我可以賣你一把好開鎖工具 15 銀幣，或一套棒的 Acme 盜賊工具組 100 銀幣。」

The cards, they been very, very good to: Welcome to the Thieves' Guild Union, Local 1313.
「這些牌待我很、很好呢。」: 「歡迎來到盜賊公會工會，第 1313 分會。」
